command: wordpress-api-tool --output json --env-file .env post set-status --post-type pages --slug about-us --to publish --require-current draft

before_state.restore_note: Use this saved before-state as the source for a deliberate manual restore if you need to undo the change later.

verification_plan: After apply, re-fetch the post and assert the status matches the requested value.

rollback.notes: To revert, re-run with the same selector and the previous status via --to 'draft'. Example: wordpress-api-tool --apply post set-status --post-type pages --slug about-us --to 'draft'.
